title: begonia × breviscapa
intro: Begonia × breviscapa, also known as Begonia breviscapa, is a hybrid plant in the Begoniaceae family, which is a cross between Begonia and a related species. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Begonia breviscapa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and promoting blood circulation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, where it is dried and then steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
